_note: Single source of truth for cross-language Merkle parity. Loaded by frontend/src/__tests__/merkle.parity.test.ts, contracts/test/MerkleParity.t.sol, and scripts/verify_offline.py. Regenerate via the command in this file's module docstring.

cases.name: empty
cases._comment: Empty input yields the empty string root in both regimes — the Solidity verifyProof never sees this state (commitBatch rejects zero roots); included for Python/TS exhaustiveness.

cases.name: single-leaf
cases._comment: Single leaf: root == leaf. Verifier accepts empty proof.

cases.name: two-leaves-hand-derived
cases._comment:
Hand-derivation:
  sha256('alpha')                = 8ed3f6ad685b959ead7022518e1af76cd816f8e8ec7ccdda1ed4018e8f2223f8
  sha256('beta')                 = f44e64e75f3948e9f73f8dfa94721c4ce8cbb4f265c4790c702b2d41cfbf2753
  keccak(UTF8 of sha256-hex 'alpha') = 0x18d638bf1284f6b50b4cd69e75a266fbc043e3c23de8ae6264e9c0e5feeba52e
  keccak(UTF8 of sha256-hex 'beta')  = 0xa138f7c00631498b847eb210656a7daabc69547c95284190fae01761c5747b80
  sorted pair concat (lo,hi)     = (0x18d638bf1284f6b50b4cd69e75a266fbc043e3c23de8ae6264e9c0e5feeba52e, 0xa138f7c00631498b847eb210656a7daabc69547c95284190fae01761c5747b80)
  root = keccak(lo || hi)        = 0x9c5eaf32feebda68288f15b8f7b34568ddc99f90b76da6f9ad55c5d2212fb45f
Any panellist with a keccak primitive can reproduce this in 30 seconds.

cases.name: three-leaves-odd
cases._comment: Odd leaf count exercises duplicate-last semantics at level 0. Mirrors contracts/test/LandRegistryAnchor.t.sol::test_VerifyProof_ThreeLeaves.

cases.name: eight-leaves
cases._comment: Balanced binary tree, no duplicate-last anywhere.

cases.name: sixteen-leaves
cases._comment: Real-world batch shape (~16 events per anchor under normal load).

cases.name: five-leaves-odd
cases._comment: Odd count at multiple levels — duplicate-last fires twice.

cases.name: permuted-order
cases._comment: Input ordering matters: this produces a different root than 'a','b','c','d'. The verifier MUST NOT accept a proof generated against the sorted-input tree if the leaves are out of order.

cases.name: real-uganda-batch
cases._comment: Five realistic audit-event leaves drawn from Mityana pilot scope. Hashes the event-type:id form, not raw PII (per project invariant #2).
